title: Follow site biosecurity procedures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Follow site biosecurity procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to enter biosecurity site

pcs.text: Confirm biosecurity procedures and protocols with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm biosecurity procedures and protocols with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm biosecurity procedures and protocols with supervisor.

pcs.text: Ensure all vehicles are decontaminated before entering and leaving the biosecurity area according to biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure all vehicles are decontaminated before entering and leaving the biosecurity area according to biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure all vehicles are decontaminated before entering and leaving the biosecurity area according to biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and report contact with potential biosecurity risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report contact with potential biosecurity risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report contact with potential biosecurity risk.

pcs.text: Perform personal decontamination before entering biosecurity area according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform personal decontamination before entering biosecurity area according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform personal decontamination before entering biosecurity area according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Store and isolate personal fomites from biosecurity area according to workplace and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store and isolate personal fomites from biosecurity area according to workplace and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and isolate personal fomites from biosecurity area according to workplace and biosecurity procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to enter biosecurity site

elements.title: Prepare to work in biosecurity site

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, check and apply personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and apply personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and apply personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Apply personal hygiene procedures while working in biosecurity or quarantine area environments according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply personal hygiene procedures while working in biosecurity or quarantine area environments according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check disinfectant levels and report irregularities to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check disinfectant levels and report irregularities to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check disinfectant levels and report irregularities to supervisor.

elements.title: Work in biosecurity site

pcs.text: Handle and store chemicals and medications according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and store chemicals and medications according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and store chemicals and medications according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Store and label production materials and products to minimise risk according to biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store and label production materials and products to minimise risk according to biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and label production materials and products to minimise risk according to biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and report abnormal conditions of produce/stock to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report abnormal conditions of produce/stock to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report abnormal conditions of produce/stock to supervisor.

pcs.text: Dispose of all waste according to workplace biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of all waste according to workplace biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of all contaminated produce according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of all contaminated produce according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of all contaminated produce according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Maintain records for quarantine activities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records for quarantine activities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records for quarantine activities according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Perform personal decontamination before exiting biosecurity or quarantine area according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform personal decontamination before exiting biosecurity or quarantine area according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Follow visitor quarantine procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check visitor sign in, sign out and hygiene procedures are observed according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure quarantine facilities are secured according to workplace security procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure quarantine facilities are secured according to workplace security procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure quarantine facilities are secured according to workplace security procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain security of boundaries and fencing according to supervisor's instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain security of boundaries and fencing according to supervisor's instructions.

pcs.text: Check deliveries to site comply with delivery procedures and biosecurity protocols

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check deliveries to site comply with delivery procedures and biosecurity protocols.

elements.title: Respond to infringements of site biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Secure site where quarantine infringement occurs according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply sanitation procedures to affected areas according to workplace procedures and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Isolate potentially contaminated produce, stock or materials and monitor for evidence of contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Isolate potentially contaminated produce, stock or materials and monitor for evidence of contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Isolate potentially contaminated produce, stock or materials and monitor for evidence of contamination.

pcs.text: Treat or dispose of all contaminated produce, stock and materials according to workplace quarantine procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Treat or dispose of all contaminated produce, stock and materials according to workplace quarantine procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Treat or dispose of all contaminated produce, stock and materials according to workplace quarantine procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain records of quarantine infringements according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of quarantine infringements according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of quarantine infringements according to workplace procedures.
